'''Elarles''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Waiter/Legends|waiter]] at a tavern located in one of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] energy mining facilities on [[Mimban/Legends|Circarpous V]].

==Biography==
When taking orders, he would remain distant from customers since he wanted to keep the substance that he smoked while working from making them lose their appetite.

Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Elarles noted something suspicious about two supposed miners that he was waiting on. Though [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|the male]] had the calloused hands of a typical miner, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|his female companion]] did not. Elarles informed a nearby Imperial bureaucrat of his suspicions.

{{Char-stub}}
